udl.title: UDL Checklist
udl.description: Universal Design for Learning guidelines to ensure inclusive content.

checklist.multipleMediaTypes: Content is presented in multiple media types (text, audio, video)
checklist.altTextProvided: All images and media have descriptive alt text
checklist.captionsProvided: All video and audio content has captions or transcripts
checklist.readingLevel: Text is written at an appropriate reading level
checklist.vocabularySupport: Key vocabulary is defined or supported with glossary
checklist.colorNotOnly: Color is not the only means of conveying information
checklist.contrastRatio: Text meets minimum contrast ratio (4.5:1 for normal text)
checklist.keyboardAccessible: All interactive elements are keyboard accessible
checklist.multipleAssessment: Multiple means of assessment are provided
checklist.choiceInExpression: Learners have choice in how they express understanding
checklist.feedbackProvided: Timely and specific feedback is provided
checklist.goalsVisible: Learning goals are clearly stated and visible
checklist.scaffolding: Scaffolding supports are available for complex tasks
